personal.name: Vahnitha Kanuri
personal.role: Logistics Coordinator · Supply Chain · Warehouse Operations

resume.summary: Logistics & Supply Chain professional with proven experience supervising 25+ staff at Maersk's 80% automated distribution centre across picking, dispatch and decanting operations. Acted as Shift Manager for 6 months, coordinating freight documentation, container bookings and transport provider liaison. Master of Supply Chain & Logistics Management (RMIT, 2026) combined with Dangerous Goods, Air Cargo Security and RACA certifications. Committed to operational excellence, inventory accuracy and on-time fulfilment.
resume.availability: Immediate · Full-time · Open to shift work

jobs.title: Team Leader / Acting Shift Manager
bullets: Managed end-to-end warehouse operations in an 80% automated distribution centre across picking, dispatch and decanting departments.
Supervised, coached and performance-managed a team of 25 warehouse staff to meet daily throughput and accuracy KPIs.
Acted as Shift Manager for 6 months, assuming full responsibility for shift-wide logistics coordination and operational performance.
Coordinated container bookings, shipping documentation and freight compliance; liaised with transport providers and 3PL freight partners.
Operated WMS and RF scanners to maintain real-time inventory visibility and order fulfilment accuracy.
Managed dispatch coordination and container closure, ensuring on-time, accurate shipment of orders.
Maintained WHS safety compliance across automated warehouse operations, proactively reducing incident risk.
Identified and implemented process improvements to streamline logistics workflow and boost operational efficiency.

jobs.title: Workforce Manager & Unit Supervisor
bullets: Managed workforce scheduling and resource allocation for operational service teams.
Supervised staff productivity, operational workflow and multi-unit service delivery.

internships.title: HR Intern · Steel Plant
bullets: Assisted with workforce coordination, employee documentation and operational workforce planning.

internships.title: HR & Administration Intern · Sparkles Laundry Services (Central Railways Contractor)
bullets: Supported workforce coordination, production scheduling, service operations and administrative records.

paragraphs: I am writing to express my strong interest in your Logistics Coordinator opportunity. With two years of hands-on experience at Maersk managing warehouse operations, supervising 25 staff and coordinating freight documentation and container bookings in an 80% automated distribution centre, I bring practical, Australian-market logistics expertise from day one.

As Acting Shift Manager, I developed confidence in transport coordination, 3PL liaison and operational decision-making under pressure. My RMIT Master of Supply Chain and Logistics Management, combined with Dangerous Goods, Air Cargo Security and RACA certifications, positions me to add immediate value to your team.
I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience aligns with your logistics operations.
